title: Physiology PhD Program Mission and Vision
content:
Physiology PhD Program Mission and Vision

Vision :

It is to train individuals who present the problem and produce solutions with experts who have sufficient knowledge to meet the current and contemporary needs by evaluating the current scientific data.

Mission :

With this program, by giving medical physiology doctorate education at an international level, having a certain knowledge and skill about the basic principles of human physiology from the cell level to the organ and organ systems level, being able to do scientific research, therefore to be able to establish the right hypotheses in research and to choose and use the right methods to prove these hypotheses. It is aimed to train physiologists who have gained the ability to access, evaluate and interpret information, can follow international literature, are open to development in their own field, and can fulfill the requirements of independent and joint group work when necessary.
